lanes.summary: Earlier cheap scout wave is complete.
Wave C reports from Newton, Linnaeus, Ampere, Pascal, Boyle and Peirce are folded into owner pages or agent-knowledge.jsonl where useful.
Claude may self-select the next bounded, source-backed subsystem or verification lane without waiting for Codex assignment.
Second PDF reconciliation wave integrated into External-Research-Reports, UI hub, lifecycle/integration/supply pages and agent-knowledge.jsonl.
Godel/Gauss/Popper/Locke/Planck/Schrodinger reports folded into owner docs and machine-readable context; publish validation remains.
Hardening-Implementation-Roadmap.md turns residual Auth/PV owner decisions into concrete patch order, source files and validation gates.

rules: Update Progress-Dashboard.md and agent-status.json when visible ownership or lane state changes.
Append, do not overwrite, Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl.
Use source-cited evidence for broken/partial-feature claims.
Treat external PDFs as downstream corroboration unless independently source-checked.
If a branch is stale, integrate targeted findings instead of merging over newer navigation.
Keep docs/wiki and the GitHub wiki checkout in parity before publishing.
Use Arma 2 OA scripting references only.
